[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101111 8
1 1100000111 5
2 0101111101 7
3 0010001000 2
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a

7 0010100000 2
